acceptance.criterion: `devin-cli` is a canonical built-in optional worker adapter and never silently degrades to `custom-cli`; setup/onboarding reports its availability and pinned model honestly.
acceptance.evidence: Built-in registry/schema/config/setup/onboarding changes in 4a62080; setup/config/onboard tests pass.

acceptance.criterion: A fixture-backed full run can prepare, launch, monitor/await, complete, and reconcile through the Devin adapter while existing Grok full-run behavior remains green.
acceptance.evidence: Fixture create/capture/resume lifecycle tests pass; strict canonical gate ran 962 tests successfully.

acceptance.criterion: Devin session creation and resume bind one exact captured session ID; ambiguous latest/continue recovery and cross-worktree session selection are rejected.
acceptance.evidence: Exact --resume binding, isolated-list/ATIF capture, ambiguity rejection, and post-terminal fast-exit regression tests pass.

acceptance.criterion: Worker authority remains limited to the assigned worktree/feature branch, transport evidence is host-derived, secrets are redacted, and PR/merge/tag/protected-ref authority remains host-owned.
acceptance.evidence: Host-owned capture plus private no-follow auth projection and authority/redaction suites pass; worker push remained blocked.

acceptance.criterion: Documentation explains SWE-1.7 Lightning selection, launch/follow/recovery behavior, trust graduation, and identical Claude Code/Codex workflow semantics.
acceptance.evidence: README, setup recipe, onboarding reference, survival template, and Unreleased changelog document the optional route and host parity.

acceptance.criterion: Impact-selected adapter/full-run/setup tests and the applicable canonical repository gate pass without weakening existing tests or making an optional provider mandatory.
acceptance.evidence: 21 Devin/security/API tests, 66 setup/onboard/config tests, and verify_repo --ci --version Unreleased all pass; 962 tests in canonical gate.

continuation_guard.next_required_action: Run the exact-tip landing check and mark PR #71 ready.

master_acceptance.criterion: Codex or Claude can stage a single Elves packet and run Devin CLI with `swe-1-7-lightning` as an optional parked implementation worker through terminal reconciliation.
master_acceptance.evidence: Devin CLI adapter defaults to swe-1-7-lightning; full-run fixtures prove staged packet launch, parked monitoring, exact capture, and reconciliation.

master_acceptance.criterion: The complete diff preserves existing Grok and host-native behavior, Elves authority boundaries, exact-session recovery, redaction, and impact-selected verification.
master_acceptance.evidence: Final cumulative review corrected headless launch, auth projection, exact capture, fast-exit ordering, and Unreleased verification; strict 962-test gate passes.

master_acceptance.criterion: User-facing docs and the Unreleased changelog describe the supported route honestly, including its optional status and Claude Code/Codex parity.
master_acceptance.evidence: README/references/CHANGELOG describe optional Devin worker use identically for Codex and Claude main drivers.
